zh.West Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Varde於1370年出生在英國越可爾科比時，他的父親Sir John Warde32歲，母親Elena de Bois16歲。他與Catherine Appleyard結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1421年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.West Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Varde于1370年出生在英国越可爾科比时，他的父亲Sir John Warde32岁，母亲Elena de Bois16岁。他与Catherine Appleyard结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1421年在英国英格兰越可爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Varde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Fernando, Gerardo, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Rafael, Agustin, Alberto, Alina, Amalia.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Antimo, Heriberto, Aniello, Carlo, Carmine, Caesar, Ciro, Dino, Eliseo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from verde ‘green’ (from Latin viridis), used as a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in this color or had green eyes, and, in Italy, also as a medieval personal name. Compare Laverde and Lo Verde .
Spanish: in some cases, a habitational name from any of the places called Verde, for example in A Coruña (Galicia).

variants.name: Laverde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Juan, Manuel, Adriana, Alvaro, Bernardo, Elena, Ezequiel, Francisca, Francisco, Jaime, Liliana.  Italian Dario, Leonardo, Salvatore.
Spanish; Italian (mainly La Verde): variant of Verde ‘green’, with (fused) definite article la.

variants.name: Verdi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Salvatore, Carmine, Pasquale, Antonio, Cesare, Gaetano, Geno, Giuseppe, Philomena, Rocco.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Verde  .

variants.name: Verdone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Marco, Salvatore, Agostino, Carlo, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Giuseppe.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Verde  .

variants.name: Lo Verde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Francesco, Vito, Antonio, Filomena, Gaspare, Giuseppe, Nichola, Nino, Santo, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern; also Loverde): variant of the nickname Verde 1 ‘green’, with the addition of the definite article lo.

variants.name: Virdi
meanings: Italian (mainly Sicily): regional variant of   Verde  .
Indian (Punjab): unexplained.

variants.name: Verdejo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Jose, Natividad, Adela, Alberto, Alicia, Ana, Angel, Candido, Carlos, Catalino, Cruz.
Spanish:
variant of Berdejo, a habitational name from Berdejo, a town in Zaragoza.

variants.name: Verdino
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Verdino, a pet form of Verde .

variants.name: Verducci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nicola, Pasco, Rocco, Vittorio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Verde   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Varde was born in 1370, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Warde, was 32 and his mother, Elena de Bois, was 16. He married Catherine Appleyard. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1421, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Varde est né en 1370, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Warde, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elena de Bois, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Appleyard. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1421, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Varde 1370 in Kirby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Warde 32 und seine Mutter Elena de Bois 16. Er hat Catherine Appleyard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1421 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Varde è nato il nel 1370 nel Kirby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Warde, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elena de Bois, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Appleyard. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1421, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John de Vardeが1370年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーで生まれた時，父Sir John Wardeは32歳，母Elena de Boisは16歳であった。Catherine Appleyardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1421年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Varde(이)가 1370년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Warde(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Bois(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Catherine Appleyard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.West Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Varde nasceu em 1370, em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Warde, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Bois, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Appleyard. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1421, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Varde родился в 1370 г. в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Warde было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de Bois, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Appleyard. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1421 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Varde nació en 1370, en Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Warde, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elena de Bois, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Catherine Appleyard. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1421, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
